findings.summary: No fiducials on B.Cu (12 SMD components) (finest pad dim 0.80mm — coarse pitch only)
findings.description: B.Cu has 0 fiducial(s) but 12 SMD components. Assembly machines need >= 3 fiducials for accurate placement.
findings.recommendation: Add fiducial markers for pick-and-place alignment (3 per side with SMD).

findings.summary: Orientation: 2 passives on B.Cu deviate from 90 deg majority
findings.description: 2 of 9 passives on B.Cu are not at the majority 90 deg orientation.
findings.recommendation: Align passive component orientations for consistent pick-and-place.

findings.description: Component J1 on F.Cu is only -0.12mm from the board edge, risking damage during depaneling or handling.
findings.recommendation: Move J1 further from board edge (currently -0.12mm, recommend >= 1.0mm)

findings.description: Component J9 on F.Cu is only 0.23mm from the board edge, risking damage during depaneling or handling.
findings.recommendation: Move J9 further from board edge (currently 0.23mm, recommend >= 1.0mm)

findings.description: Component REF** on F.Cu is only 0.55mm from the board edge, risking damage during depaneling or handling.
findings.recommendation: Move REF** further from board edge (currently 0.55mm, recommend >= 1.0mm)

findings.description: Component REF** on F.Cu is only 0.55mm from the board edge, risking damage during depaneling or handling.
findings.recommendation: Move REF** further from board edge (currently 0.55mm, recommend >= 1.0mm)

findings.description: 0 of 13 signal nets have test points (0% coverage).
findings.recommendation: Add test points to improve ICT/flying probe coverage.

findings.description: Zone stitching on net GND: 76 vias across layers ['B.Cu', 'F.Cu'].
